input:
Requirement: Contractor must have completed >=3 metro FM projects in 5 years.
Evidence 1 - Riyadh Metro FM 2021.
Evidence 2 - Doha Metro FM 2019.
Liquidated damages of 1% of contract value per week of delay, capped at 20%, with an 8-month delivery for an infrastructure project.
